articles.title: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
articles.summary: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.

articles.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
articles.summary: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

articles.title: Married at First Sight Australia allegations 'disturbing', says country's watchdog
articles.summary: The claims also prompted a response from UK media regulator Ofcom, who called them "deeply concerning".

articles.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
articles.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been sentenced to four years in jail.

articles.title: Brazil woman dies after rope-jumping instructors fail to attach cord
articles.summary: Three men have been arrested after instructors failed to attach a rope to her before helping her jump from a bridge.

articles.title: South African jazz legend Abdullah Ibrahim dies at 91
articles.summary: Ibrahim helped define a genre of South African jazz music in a career that spanned eight decades.

articles.title: MSF staff abused Sudanese refugees in sex-for-food scandal
articles.summary: Some victims said they chose not to speak out because they feared staff would cut off access to aid.

articles.title: 'Spider-Man of Yemen' dies falling into volcanic crater
articles.summary: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar had been attempting to climb its walls without safety equipment when he fell in, local authorities say.

articles.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
articles.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people.

articles.title: US musician Oliver Tree dies in helicopter collision in Brazil
articles.summary: The singer-songwriter is among six people presumed dead in an air crash over Rio de Janeiro on Sunday.
